name: Solana & Anchor Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sh -c "$(curl -sSfL https://release.solana.com/stable/install)" && export PATH="/root/.local/share/solana/install/active_release/bin:$PATH" && solana --version && cargo install --git https://github.com/coral-xyz/anchor avm --locked && avm install latest && avm use latest && anchor --version'
